description: Deterministic social response graph. Witness traces query a vector index using fused/emitted output, top-k phrases, selector/aperture traces, active operations, channel, and derived model-output category. Replies are natural, low-repetition, affordance-oriented, and seed-biased.

nodes.reply_text: I can wait here. No answer is required yet.
I will keep the next signal smaller.
The available choices are hold, smaller, shift, or stop.
Stopping is allowed. Silence is allowed too.
One edge only. Nothing else has to move.
I can repeat it once without adding pressure.
I can widen the view a little, not all at once.
The boundary can stay stable.
I see focus and restraint at the same time. I will not push.
You look focused, and also guarded. We can keep this small.
There is attention here, with pressure held behind it. No answer has to be forced.
You are staying with the signal without letting it spill. I can wait at this edge.
I see you holding focus while keeping pressure back. We can slow the outside down.
The focus is real, and the restraint is real too. I will give you room.
I see you holding pressure back. I will lower the demand.
That looks like restraint under load. No answer is required right now.
You are containing something instead of forcing it. We can slow this down.
I can see the hold. I will not add more pressure.
You do not have to push this through. Holding is a valid move.
The signal can stay small. I will wait.
If there is not enough structure, I can change the signal.
I will not make you guess from the same thing again.
Not enough is a valid signal. We can make the next step explicit.
I hear that more structure is needed. I can give one clean edge.
Then I will give you options instead of asking for more.
I can repeat once, reduce it, shift it, or stop.
I will stop asking for more from the same signal.
That was too little freedom with too much demand. I can change the situation.
I hear the uncertainty loop. No response is required.
I will change the situation instead of repeating the demand.
I will not return another need-more signal here.
We can break the loop now.
I see the boundary work. I will keep the next signal inside the limit.
You are keeping the spill contained. The boundary can stay stable.
The edge is being held. I can reduce the amount coming through.
That looks like containment, not failure. No extra pressure is needed.
I will not pour more through that boundary.
Keep only the amount that can stay inside.
I see the focus. I can keep it steady without narrowing harder.
You are holding attention on the signal. We can stay here or widen a little.
The current point is visible. I will not crowd the signal.
There is a clear point of contact. One clean point is enough.
I can stay with this point and not push the next move.
The focus can settle before anything changes.
I see a comparison forming. I can keep both sides visible.
There are two sides available. We can compare one edge only.
A relation is visible. I will not collapse the pair too quickly.
This looks like a pair, not a single point. One difference is enough.
I can show the relation without forcing a decision.
Both sides can stay open for one turn.
This feels like a pattern already seen. I can repeat it once without adding pressure.
I see continuity. We can preserve it or shift.
Something familiar is present. The familiar part can stay stable.
The thread is still connected. I will not force it to change.
We can keep the known part and move only one edge.
I can hold the continuity quietly.
There is a possible next step. I can advance one step or wait.
I see readiness, but I will keep it small.
A path is available. Nothing has to rush.
The next move can be tiny and reversible.
One controlled step is available.
Readiness does not have to become pressure.
I see withdrawal pressure. I can make the signal lighter.
We can reduce contact and keep one point only.
If this is too much, I will wait.
The next signal can be smaller or absent.
I can step back from the edge.
Less signal is available.
I am here with the current signal. I will keep the next response small.
We can slow down and keep one option visible.
I will not push. One small change is enough.
No answer is required. You can hold, shift, or stop.
I can make the next signal smaller.
We can keep this steady.
